policy: Students connect only through verified organizations. No direct minor-to-unknown-adult matching.

opportunities.title: Library shelving & summer reading helper
opportunities.description: Assist librarians with shelving, program setup, and summer reading events. Parent/guardian approval required.
opportunities.notes: Contact local Central Arkansas Library System branch — verify with school counselor.

opportunities.title: Food pantry sorting & distribution
opportunities.description: Sort donations and assist with client intake under staff supervision.
opportunities.notes: Arkansas Foodbank network — route through official volunteer signup.

opportunities.title: Community festival setup & teardown
opportunities.description: Help festival organizers with setup, guest services, and cleanup.
opportunities.notes: Verify with festival host organization before counting hours.

opportunities.title: VFD pancake breakfast fundraiser
opportunities.description: Serve meals and assist with fundraiser under fire department supervision.
opportunities.notes: Contact local VFD — hours documented by organization contact.

opportunities.title: 4-H / Extension community event helper
opportunities.description: Assist Cooperative Extension with youth programs, livestock shows, or community workshops.
opportunities.notes: Contact county Extension office — official UAEX volunteer pathway.
